lines.speaker: Banknote Exchange Merchant
lines.text: Hello. Do you wish me to exchange banknotes for you? I charge only 5 coins for each banknote.

lines.speaker: Banknote Exchange Merchant
lines.text: Hand me the banknotes you wish me to exchange.

lines.speaker: Banknote Exchange Merchant
lines.text: I am a banknote exchange merchant. I can exchange banknotes for real items. Do you want any banknotes converted?

lines.speaker: Banknote Exchange Merchant
lines.text: Hand me the banknotes you wish me to exchange.
